name: Mexican Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken wings, disjointed and tips discarded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a small bowl, whisk together the oil, chili powder, oregano, and cumin to blend well.
2. Pulse the tortilla chips in a food processor until they form a fine texture. Pour into a shallow bowl.
3. Dip each chicken piece in the seasoned oil, then dredge in the ground chips until fully coated. Place on a foil-lined baking sheet.
4. Bake for 45 minutes, or until browned and crisp outside and tender inside. Serve hot.
